evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the delivery state lifecycle requirement.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the delivery state lifecycle, but the evidence provided does not include any delivery rows or their corresponding states. The linked use case specifies the need for one delivery row per event, subscription, and channel, but there is no evidence of such rows being created or tracked in the prior steps. This indicates a gap in the implementation of the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No delivery rows are present to validate the requirement of one delivery row per (event, subscription, channel).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
